name: insertImageFromUrl
description: Inserts an inline image into a Google Document from a publicly accessible URL.

documentId.description: The ID of the Google Document (from the URL).

imageUrl.description: Publicly accessible URL to the image (must be http:// or https://).

index.description: The index (1-based) where the image should be inserted.

width.description: Optional: Width of the image in points.

height.description: Optional: Height of the image in points.
